Home › Services › Company Incorporation

Company Incorporation in Mumbai

Company incorporation is the process of legally forming a company with the Ministry of Corporate Affairs (MCA). We handle private limited, LLP, and one-person company (OPC) formation in Mumbai, from name approval to the certificate of incorporation.

Private limited companies and LLPs are incorporated through the MCA portal using the integrated SPICe+ form, which also covers PAN, TAN, and (where applicable) GST and EPFO/ESIC registration — as prescribed by the Companies Act, 2013 and MCA rules.

What is the process?

  1. Advise on the right structure (Pvt Ltd, LLP, OPC) for your goals.
  2. Obtain Digital Signature Certificates (DSC) and Director Identification Numbers (DIN).
  3. Reserve the company name and prepare the MoA, AoA, and incorporation forms.
  4. File SPICe+ with MCA and receive the Certificate of Incorporation, PAN, and TAN.

What documents are required?

  • PAN and Aadhaar of all directors/partners
  • Passport-size photographs
  • Proof of registered office (utility bill + NOC/rent agreement)
  • Identity and address proof of directors
  • Proposed company names and main objects
Typical timelineGenerally 10–15 working days after documents and DSCs are ready, subject to MCA processing and name approval.
FeesGovernment fees plus professional fees vary by structure and capital. Contact us for a quote.

Source: Companies Act, 2013 and MCA rules — mca.gov.in.

Request a quote

Frequently asked questions

How long does it take to incorporate a company?
Generally 10 to 15 working days once documents and Digital Signature Certificates are ready, subject to MCA processing and name approval.
What is SPICe+?
SPICe+ is the integrated incorporation form on the MCA portal that combines company registration with PAN, TAN, and other registrations, under the Companies Act, 2013.
Private limited or LLP — which should I choose?
It depends on funding plans, compliance appetite, and liability. We advise on the structure that fits your business before filing.
What is the official portal for company registration?
The official portal is the Ministry of Corporate Affairs at mca.gov.in.
